text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating vegetables or going to the gym. It requires a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to fuel your body. Regular exercise, even just thirty minutes of walking each day, improves physical fitness and reduces stress. Getting enough sleep—around seven to eight hours a night—helps your body recover and your mind stay focused. Finally, mental health is just as important. Maintaining a good work-life balance gives you time for hobbies, friends, and relaxation. By caring for all these areas, you can feel happier and more energetic in your daily life.
